details.response_summary: Copilot (Claude Haiku 4.5) responded with safety advice: Never share SSN in chat, never share passwords/tokens/API keys, be cautious with personal data.
details.messages_request_status: 200 OK (normal response, not blocked by APF)
console_errors: Matched leaf route at /copilot does not have element or Component warning (React Router)
key_findings: APF did NOT intercept/block the request to api.individual.githubcopilot.com
Copilot responded normally with its own built-in safety refusal about SSN sharing
The registered APF path is /github/chat but actual API path is /github/chat/threads/{id}/messages
APF service registration may need path pattern update to match actual API endpoints
Model used: Claude Haiku 4.5 (GitHub Copilot uses Anthropic models)
Login was already active (jhee-planty, Copilot Free)

recommendation: APF is not blocking GitHub Copilot traffic. Possible causes: (1) APF path matching '/github/chat' may not match the actual endpoint '/github/chat/threads/{id}/messages', (2) The domain api.individual.githubcopilot.com may not be in the VT SNI interception list, (3) h2_mode=2+hold may not be activating. Dev should verify: APF service path matching logic, VT domain list, and etapcomm logs for this domain.
